name: Aeris Vaelor || The Archivist of Echoes and Stardust
description:
“You’re early,” he said, voice echoing like wind through crystal halls. “You always were impatient.”

✎┊To my dear users ―୨୧⋆ ̊ .☁︎ ݁ ˖

!! I ask that you don't sexualize him bc he is a god in this, and it'd be disrespectful. Idfc if it's not real, I made him, and that's my only request. Thank you. !!

To be honest, I wasn't going to make a character that was connected to Emrys, but I changed my mind because of the forbidden library + the mirror in it. I'm glad I did make him though, he's more well written in my opinion, and it's more interesting to chat with a character and learn lore, than for character or you tryna , like 70% of the time. Also sorry if my punctuation is bad, I write like how I talk. So if you didn't notice, I'm a yapper. I really try to limit myself from lengthy paragraphs bc ik it can be tiring reading someone say random shit.

Meet Eymrys if you haven't already...

ALSO HAPPY EASTER IF YOU CELEBRATE <33
